# MandiRates — llms.txt

## What is MandiRates?
MandiRates (mandirates.app) is a free real-time agricultural commodity price tracker for India. It provides daily mandi (market) rates for 100+ crops from 500+ mandis across all 28 states.

## Data Source
All price data is sourced from Agmarknet (data.gov.in) — India's official Agricultural Marketing Information Network, maintained by the Government of India.

## Key Features
- Live mandi prices updated every 6 hours
- Coverage: 500+ mandis across all 28 Indian states
- 100+ commodities: cereals, pulses, oilseeds, vegetables, fruits
- MSP (Minimum Support Price) comparison tool
- State-wise and mandi-wise filtering
- Tamil Nadu featured state spotlight
- AI-powered price insights via chat

## Commodities Tracked
Wheat, Rice/Paddy, Maize, Soybean, Groundnut, Mustard, Cotton, Onion, Tomato, Potato, Chilli, Garlic, Banana, Coconut, and 100+ more.

## Who Uses MandiRates?
- Farmers (kisans) checking today's mandi bhav
- Agricultural traders and commission agents
- Agri-tech companies and commodity analysts
- Government officials monitoring market prices
- Researchers and journalists covering agriculture

## Free Access
MandiRates is completely free. No account, no subscription, no paywalls.

## Contact
Website: https://mandirates.app
Data: Agmarknet / data.gov.in
